product.name: Sweet Home Collection Pinch Pleat Kitchen Curtain Window Treatment Choice 36", 24" Tier and Valance Kit, Gray
product.description: Decorate with uncompromising sophistication. The Hudson Pintuck Window Curtain 36" Tier Pair will brighten your space with luxurious, crisp white fabric and classic pin-tuck patterns. Subtle pin-tucks add life and motion to the luxurious fabric by pulling the into a barely-there diamond pattern. The geometric element is so simple and effective without excessive embellishment. Keep your style clean, classic, and effortlessly cool, just like you.
features: Made of 100% Brushed Microfiber that is super soft and exceeds style and comfort expectations
Each curtain item has a rod pocket that will fit curtain rods up to 1.5" in diameter
Dimensions: Each Tier 36" long x 30" wide, Valance 12" long x 60" wide
These curtains feature a unique design that will spruce up your kitchen, bedroom, or any room in your home. Match with other items from our pinch pleat collection for a unique fashionable look!
Care Instructions: Machine wash in cold water with similar colors.
